source_jobs.description: <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">If you are interested in joining the Avanath Team but do not see an opportunity that you would like to apply to, please send us your resume. We will keep your information on file and will reach out if we find a match!&nbsp;</span></p>
